title: Stasiun Central Hub
description: Just a short walk from Bandung’s main intercity train station, Hotel Mutiara offers guests effortless access to major routes across Java. With frequent trains connecting Bandung to Jakarta, Surabaya, Yogyakarta, Semarang, and other key cities, our location on Jalan Kebon Kawung makes long‑distance travel smooth and convenient. It’s the ideal base for guests who value easy mobility while staying in the heart of Bandung.

title: Tiara Poolside Dining
description: Set beside our open‑air swimming pool, this spacious dining area offers a relaxed colonial‑style atmosphere perfect for enjoying Bandung’s vibrant culinary scene. Guests are welcome to bring in their favorite local street food from the many nearby vendors and enjoy it by the pool, creating a casual, authentic Bandung dining experience in a comfortable and scenic setting.

title: Colonial Oasis
description: Inspired by the Dutch‑era residences that still shape the character of Bandung, Hotel Mutiara brings a warm colonial charm to the heart of the city. Classic architectural touches, vintage details, and a calm, timeless atmosphere create a relaxing retreat for guests who appreciate heritage style blended with modern comfort.

title: Grand Convention Halls
description: Designed with elegant high ceilings and classic colonial‑style architecture, our event spaces offer a bright, airy atmosphere ideal for weddings, celebrations, and corporate gatherings. Guests can enjoy naturally ventilated or fully air‑conditioned settings, creating a flexible and comfortable venue that brings timeless Bandung charm to every occasion.

title: Family-First Layouts
description: Designed with comfort and flexibility in mind, our family‑friendly room options offer generous space for groups of all sizes. From practical multi‑bed layouts to larger executive family rooms, each setup provides an easy, relaxed environment ideal for parents, children, and extended families traveling together. It’s a convenient and comfortable way to experience Bandung while staying close to the city’s main attractions.

title: Crystalline Relaxation
description: Our outdoor swimming pool offers a refreshing open‑air escape surrounded by the hotel’s warm colonial ambiance. The space is comfortably child‑friendly and includes a casual ping‑pong area, making it a relaxed spot for families and leisure travellers alike. Guests can unwind by the clear waters, enjoy the breeze, and savour Bandung’s local flavours from nearby street food vendors in a peaceful, scenic setting.
